page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7t.16xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at a base clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The system is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates strong multi-core processing capabilities. The instance achieves top-tier results in multi-core stress-ng tests, Geekbench multi-core evaluations, and PassMark CPU scores. It also demonstrates high performance in specialized tasks such as software compilation with Clang, ray tracing, and image processing. Memory performance is highly efficient for cached small-block reads, though uncached large-block read and write operations fall into the average tier. Cryptographic operations and database operations also perform in the top 25% bracket.

Given the 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this server is highly optimized for compute-heavy workloads rather than memory-intensive applications. The lack of local NVMe storage means all disk I/O relies on network-attached volumes, which is a key architectural consideration. The instance is highly suited for multi-threaded computational tasks, software build pipelines, static web serving, and small-scale language model inference, where its strong multi-core execution and 32 Gbps network bandwidth can be fully utilized.
description: The Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7t.16xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores running at 2.7 GHz, paired with 128.0 GB of RAM. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, this server provides a 1:2 vCPU-to-memory ratio, 32 Gbps of baseline network bandwidth, and no local storage or GPU accelerators. Benchmark results show strong multi-core performance, particularly in software compilation, ray tracing, database operations, and multi-threaded decompression. Conversely, single-core performance and uncached memory bandwidth remain in the average tier. This hardware profile makes the instance highly suitable for compute-intensive workloads, including CI/CD pipelines, static web serving, and parallel processing tasks, while requiring network-attached storage for data persistence.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7t.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong multi-core performance for parallel workloads.

tagline: A dedicated 64-core compute-optimized instance delivering strong multi-threaded performance and high network bandwidth for parallel processing workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B cores running at 2.7 GHz
128.0 GB of system memory with a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
Strong multi-core performance in compilation and database operations
No local storage or GPU hardware included
Best suited for multi-threaded compute, CI/CD, and web serving
